args.summary: Customer James Lee (user ID: james_lee_6136) has reservation XEWRD9, a round-trip basic economy ticket. Outbound flights (LAX→ATL) were completed on May 13-14, 2024. Return flights (ATL→LAX) are scheduled for May 21, 2024. Customer wants to change return flight from ATL→LAX to ATL→LAS (nonstop). Customer is willing to upgrade from basic economy to economy to enable this change. However, policy constraints prevent basic economy modifications and cabin upgrades since outbound flights were already flown. Customer is requesting assistance exploring alternative options.
